designSystem.style: AI Personalization Landing — chaos, collage, stickers, raw internet-culture aesthetic with vibrant gradient scene cards, rotated badge stickers, bold typography, and zinc dark palette

features: Seed & Forge: initiate or extend AI 3D scenes via text prompts
Spatial Scene Editor: gradient-rendered scene thumbnails with branch visualization
Continuum Trails: SVG branching tree showing scene evolution history
Agentic Muse Assistant: AI prompt suggestions in the forge screen
Club Galleries & Challenges: weekly themed challenge banner and hot forge feed
